name: backend
description: Splitwise clone for knowledge demostration purposes

scripts.start: npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma db seed && node src/index.js
scripts.dev: npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma db seed && LOG_PRETTY=true nodemon
scripts.test: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && jest --runInBand --forceExit
